case_title: BULLOCK, JOE et al VS ORTIZ, DONNA SPECIAL EVENTS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,752.00 FILED BY BULLOCK, JOE CROSBY, MARCIA AS TO DEFENDANT ORTIZ, DONNA         SPECIAL EVENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-23-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
